isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monni - 이쯤에서 (Here)

Romanization

heeojil su eopseul georago haetdeon
naui mareul bujeongharyeo hae
heeo naol su eopseul georago haetdeon
neoui mareul ijeuryeogo hae

I feel like I'm going to die

ijjeumeseo naui gyeoteul tteonagajwo
neoreul gieokhal su eomneun goseuro
du beon dasi neoreul chajeul su eomneun
geugoseuro nareul tteonagajwo

I feel like I'm going to die

ijjeumeseo naui gyeoteul tteonagajwo
neoreul gieokhal su eomneun goseuro
du beon dasi neoreul chajeul su eomneun
geugoseuro nareul tteonagajwo

areumdawotdeon uriui sigan
apeumeuro sarajyeo
sumdo swil su eopseul mangkeum
naneun yakhaejyeoisseo

ijjeumeseo naui gyeoteul tteonagajwo

du beon dasi neoreul chajeul su eomneun
geugoseuro nareul tteonagajwo

ijjeumeseo nae apeseo sarajyeojwo
neoreul jeungohal su eomneun goseuro
du beon dasi neoreul chajeul su eomneun
geugoseuro nareul tteonagajwo

I feel like I'm going to die


Hangeul

헤어질 수 없을 거라고 했던
나의 말을 부정하려 해
헤어 나올 수 없을 거라고 했던
너의 말을 잊으려고 해

I feel like I'm going to die

이쯤에서 나의 곁을 떠나가줘
너를 기억할 수 없는 곳으로
두 번 다시 너를 찾을 수 없는
그곳으로 나를 떠나가줘

I feel like I'm going to die

이쯤에서 나의 곁을 떠나가줘
너를 기억할 수 없는 곳으로
두 번 다시 너를 찾을 수 없는
그곳으로 나를 떠나가줘

아름다웠던 우리의 시간
아픔으로 사라져
숨도 쉴 수 없을 만큼
나는 약해져있어

이쯤에서 나의 곁을 떠나가줘

두 번 다시 너를 찾을 수 없는
그곳으로 나를 떠나가줘

이쯤에서 내 앞에서 사라져줘
너를 증오할 수 없는 곳으로
두 번 다시 너를 찾을 수 없는
그곳으로 나를 떠나가줘

I feel like I'm going to die

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 영원히 (FOREVER YOUNG) (feat. foggyatthebottom)

Romanization

Forever young forever young
Forever 21 can you do some.. hahahahaha
&itch ass #other4uckers you know who I am? (Ovadoz on the track)
Owen mm

More I live more I feel like I don't fit in world of ours
I rap all day so don't worry 'bout the working hours
Money and fame is good but no good if you're lonely akkawo
And alone and out of power? that's why I've been searching for

jeongdabi anieodo dwaesseo gamjeongeul baeteo saeroun gok wie
deo isang ireul ge eopseo gwaenchana ireodo back 2 being myself again
People I stand with, I know I'm a broken shed and damn
I've damaged too many people around me alji I'm the problem here

Yeah I'm a mortal man who only live once
hanggugeun hyeokkeuti gun, forever young, I’ll die if it must happen
mwo amuryeom dareugo gagyanggaksaegieodo urineun seoroui papyeon
neol sireohago joahaneun ge aniya hamkkeraneun jangmyeon

(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh forever young
(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh you should come find me
(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh forever young
(Picture's perfect paint together) Yeah come find me

nyuseu tonghaeseo bwasseo naneun hyeongdeurui struggles jinheulge ppajyeoseo deo isang meolli mot gado
na gateun dongsaengdeul pyeonhage bapgo dallil su itge you know it y'all made it harder
You know when it rains it pours bi on dwieneun anggaeneun kkallyeoitdago
jeopgeunhal su eopseo neo uh urineun mimmure sangeo mokjeojen maedallin water

deo hyeondae maen wicheung sikdang gamyeon nareul isanghage chyeodabwa u kno I still got my jagyeok
kalppang matgo chong ppang heorie majado kkeutteogeopseo sibal migugin jagyeok
tto jaepaneul georeo nan wihyeopjeogirado sumgyeo like turban
hakgyo jjaego meong ttaerineun chinggudeureun siganeul beoryeosseo circle tower

Bitch we eating buffet runnin da zips and I'm packin everything with bro to smoke
We been a goofy chong deulgo chaekgabang beoryeosseo hangguk eommadeuri sireohae
I been a cool kid hee hee hee
Hee hee hee hee

(Find me) come find me

Hangeul

Forever young forever young
Forever 21 can you do some.. hahahahaha
&itch ass #other4uckers you know who I am? (Ovadoz on the track)
Owen mm

More I live more I feel like I don't fit in world of ours
I rap all day so don't worry 'bout the working hours
Money and fame is good but no good if you're lonely 아까워
And alone and out of power? that's why I've been searching for

정답이 아니어도 됐어 감정을 뱉어 새로운 곡 위에
더 이상 잃을 게 없어 괜찮아 잃어도 back 2 being myself again
People I stand with, I know I'm a broken shed and damn
I've damaged too many people around me 알지 I'm the problem here

Yeah I'm a mortal man who only live once
한국은 혀끝이 gun, forever young, I’ll die if it must happen
뭐 아무렴 다르고 각양각색이어도 우리는 서로의 파편
널 싫어하고 좋아하는 게 아니야 함께라는 장면

(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh forever young
(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh you should come find me
(Picture's perfect paint together) Uh uh uh forever young
(Picture's perfect paint together) Yeah come find me

뉴스 통해서 봤어 나는 형들의 struggles 진흙에 빠져서 더 이상 멀리 못 가도
나 같은 동생들 편하게 밟고 달릴 수 있게 you know it y'all made it harder
You know when it rains it pours 비 온 뒤에는 안개는 깔려있다고
접근할 수 없어 너 uh 우리는 민물에 상어 목젖엔 매달린 water

더 현대 맨 위층 식당 가면 나를 이상하게 쳐다봐 u kno I still got my 자격
칼빵 맞고 총 빵 허리에 맞아도 끄떡없어 시발 미국인 자격
또 재판을 걸어 난 위협적이라도 숨겨 like turban
학교 째고 멍 때리는 친구들은 시간을 버렸어 circle tower

Bitch we eating buffet runnin da zips and I'm packin everything with bro to smoke
We been a goofy 총 들고 책가방 버렸어 한국 엄마들이 싫어해
I been a cool kid hee hee hee
Hee hee hee hee

(Find me) come find me

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 그럴 바에 (MUST BE KIDDING) (feat. Paloalto)

Romanization

Ay what up Mr. P
xrfy on the beat

What the fuck they talm 'bout?
jaba hyeonsil haendeul wae ollaineseo gwaneum namui life
Don't tell me how to act, I don't walk the way you talk
And you still wanna talk shit? okay hoe nan ireul ge hana eopseo

jilmune jilmun, sisibibi, dongbang yeui? finding Jesus
Need no makeup an sseo bibi neon bibitan not a blicky
amu mal gata boiji? ㅄ jamae insa double d-d
naega jjin bad boy not no diddy (4uck you pay me)

ijeneun byeollo an mideo jeongbo
I'm my jeongbu chaja jeongsu jeongje jeombu nae tim geongguk
baeteo seongsu come enlighten me, what have you learned?
I'm here where I'm suppose to be, neon mwo haesseo bammyeon?

geureol bae talchulhallae sigungchang sinse
geureol bae beoryeosseo ireumpyoraneun yumyeongse

You must b kidding
tteodeul sigando eopseoseo pogihaetji jaemi
You must b kidding
I rather grind 24/7, cheoreom ilgaemi

You must b kidding
nae kkum jogak doneuro exchanging
an duryeowo changing
nae changuiseong maeilmaeiri raining

sikji anneun naui beonnoee bueora gasollin
saekkideul yeongwonhal geotcheoreom guljiman aesongi
nae mesijineun ttaeron gonggamdaereul ireo gaesaekkiro boyeo
geunde munjeeopseo anjutgeori haepeuning

meijeo maineo maennal gateun taksanggongnon
ajikdo choibiji geuman neomeogaja bollon
seongchwihan ideurege balgyeonhaneun baeul jeom
yakjeomeul chatneun geon bigeop, dalli bogo kkaeuchyeo

Hella fun igeol wae ajikdo butjapgenni
manghaetda eojjeondago haedo moyeo bukjeokdaeji
doneun neomu jungyohae dadeul nari seon iyuji
mot gajil ttaen bunhago gajimyeon munjereul kiuji

dadeul paneun jungiya jinjeongseongiran idiom
twineun nomeul chaja daesereul mandeuneun midieo
jeongdabira hwaksinhaetdeon ge yeorone dwijiphyeo
oreurangnaerirak geuge geunyang sesangiriya

sesange ireoniri, surprise mother4ucker
Some fries mother4ucker

You must b kidding
tteodeul sigando eopseoseo pogihaetji jaemi
You must b kidding
I rather grind 24/7 cheoreom ilgaemi

You must b kidding
nae kkum jogak doneuro exchanging
an duryeowo changing
nae changuiseong maeilmaeiri raining

Hangeul

Ay what up Mr. P
xrfy on the beat

What the fuck they talm 'bout?
잡아 현실 핸들 왜 온라인에서 관음 남의 life
Don't tell me how to act, I don't walk the way you talk
And you still wanna talk shit? okay hoe 난 잃을 게 하나 없어

질문에 질문, 시시비비, 동방 예의? finding Jesus
Need no makeup 안 써 비비 넌 비비탄 not a blicky
아무 말 같아 보이지? ㅄ 자매 인사 double d-d
내가 찐 bad boy not no diddy (4uck you pay me)

이제는 별로 안 믿어 정보
I'm my 정부 찾아 정수 정제 전부 내 팀 건국
뱉어 성수 come enlighten me, what have you learned?
I'm here where I'm suppose to be, 넌 뭐 했어 반면?

그럴 바에 탈출할래 시궁창 신세
그럴 바에 버렸어 이름표라는 유명세

You must b kidding
떠들 시간도 없어서 포기했지 재미
You must b kidding
I rather grind 24/7, 처럼 일개미

You must b kidding
내 꿈 조각 돈으로 exchanging
안 두려워 changing
내 창의성 매일매일이 raining

식지 않는 나의 번뇌에 부어라 가솔린
새끼들 영원할 것처럼 굴지만 애송이
내 메시지는 때론 공감대를 잃어 개새끼로 보여
근데 문제없어 안줏거리 해프닝

메이저 마이너 맨날 같은 탁상공론
아직도 초입이지 그만 넘어가자 본론
성취한 이들에게 발견하는 배울 점
약점을 찾는 건 비겁, 달리 보고 깨우쳐

Hella fun 이걸 왜 아직도 붙잡겠니
망했다 어쩐다고 해도 모여 북적대지
돈은 너무 중요해 다들 날이 선 이유지
못 가질 땐 분하고 가지면 문제를 키우지

다들 파는 중이야 진정성이란 idiom
튀는 놈을 찾아 대세를 만드는 미디어
정답이라 확신했던 게 여론에 뒤집혀
오르락내리락 그게 그냥 세상일이야

세상에 이런일이, surprise mother4ucker
Some fries mother4ucker

떠들 시간도 없어서 포기했지 재미
You must b kidding
I rather grind 24/7 처럼 일개미

You must b kidding

안 두려워 changing

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 자유의지 (INTENTIONS)

Romanization

Trials and tribulations.. regardless
We gotta keep on moving foward

Yeah, I'm tryna strive for something that I
Never tried before, aiming for bigger things
I do wanna change, achieve and love all the people, I used to
Get triggered often, shot's fired, karmas came equally

Unfortunately hate ain't bring anything on the table
Fuck a label, I'm doing better than ever won't be crying later
Koonta told me, "miguk gaseo hiphap hae." relatable
With all respect to God's son, tryna be what I wanna be

Why am I rapping and what am I reppin?
The foundation of that question, I'm forever learning & searching
My intentions are clear, tell them exactly what I felt it
Sometimes can't even tell myself what I need in life to change me but

Take it from me, you all gon be free some day
Take it or leave still feeling unfazed on mondays
Don't call me OG, call me in Korean like, "cheonjae"
I'mma fly overseas and see the world and be like, 'knam saying?'

Trials and tribulations.. regardless
We gotta keep on moving foward

cheoncheonhi
ihae nae intentions
It's crystal clear
One day, we'll all be free

cheoncheonhi
neukkyeo nae tension
It's crystal clear
